title: Admin Dashboard
dashboardSubtitle: Everything across all schools and users
schoolsSubtitle: Manage registered schools and their status
usersSubtitle: View and manage every user across all schools — admins, staff, students, and guardians.
rolesSubtitle: RBAC roles and their resource permissions
auditSubtitle: System audit trail for key entities
featuresSubtitleSuperAdmin: Choose a school, then enable or disable modules for that school.
featuresSubtitleSchool: Enable or disable modules for your school.
websitesSubtitle: Pre-built school website designs available when onboarding a new school. Preview any template live, then assign it during school setup. To edit a specific school's site, open that school from Schools.
noSchoolsDesc: Add your first school to get started
noRolesDesc: Default roles are seeded during migration
noAuditDesc: Changes to tracked tables will appear here
administrationDesc: Approve, suspend, or remove this school from the platform.
currencyDescription: Choose the currency shown on fees, expenses, payroll, and parent payment screens. Defaults to US Dollars.
customizeWebsiteSubtitle: Customize every section of the public school website.
templatePickerHint: Choose a pre-built website design. Each template includes a public homepage and admissions path.
dnsInstructions: We'll provide DNS instructions to connect
schoolCreatedToast: School created. Enable their public site from the academic dashboard when ready.
